channel.title: Gen Z on After the Grind
channel.description: Recent content in Gen Z on After the Grind

item.title: The Fear Index Is Up. The Strategy Is Wrong.
item.description: A new Quinnipiac poll shows AI anxiety at record highs, and a Tufts study maps 9.3 million vulnerable jobs. But the most useful data this week came from a survey of college interns who figured out something most adults haven’t: the right response to automation isn’t fear. It’s a pivot.
